scopeAvailabilityDescriptions.global: Available on every app page, including search.
scopeAvailabilityDescriptions.listen: Available only while viewing a specific Listen practice page.
scopeAvailabilityDescriptions.speak: Available only while viewing a specific Speak practice page.
scopeAvailabilityDescriptions.read: Available only while viewing a specific Read practice page.
scopeAvailabilityDescriptions.write: Available only while viewing a specific Write practice page.

summary.title: Keyboard shortcuts
summary.description: Search opens with {{defaultSearchKeyLabel}} by default on this device. Open the editor to customize bindings and check which scopes are active on the current page.

row.conflict: This binding conflicts with another shortcut.
row.capturingHint: Capturing a new shortcut. Press Esc to cancel.

banner.prompt: Press the new key combination now.

modal.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
modal.description: Search opens with {{defaultSearchKeyLabel}} by default on this device. Current binding: {{currentBinding}}

ui.footerNote: Global shortcuts may overlap with their module equivalents, but conflicting bindings inside the same active scope are blocked.

global:toggle-chat.label: Toggle Chat
global:toggle-chat.description: Open or close the chat panel

global:toggle-selection-translate.label: Toggle Selection Translate
global:toggle-selection-translate.description: Enable or disable selection translation popup

speak:reset-conversation.label: Reset Conversation
speak:reset-conversation.description: Reset the conversation to the opening prompt

global:shadow-next-module.label: Shadow: Next Module
global:shadow-next-module.description: Jump to the next incomplete shadow reading module

global:shadow-end-session.label: Shadow: End Session
global:shadow-end-session.description: End the current shadow reading session
